productUrl.title: Product URL
productUrl.description: iHerb product URL to scrape reviews from.

productId.title: Product ID (Optional)
productId.description: Numeric iHerb product ID. If empty, it is extracted from productUrl.

maxReviews.title: Maximum Reviews
maxReviews.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape (0 = unlimited).

pageSize.title: Page Size
pageSize.description: Number of reviews fetched per API page.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for reliable scraping on protected pages.
